---
title: "Mon Document"
output:
  github_document:
    pandoc_args:
      - --lua-filter=replace-math.lua
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
library(stringr)

replace_math <- function(input) {
    # Remplacer $$ par ```math```
    output <- str_replace_all(input, "\\$\\$", "```math```")
    return(output)
}

# Lire le contenu du Rmd
input <- readLines("C:/Users/UTZK0M/Documents/Projets R/Projets MTS/Recherche/0_Div_Regresseurs_CJO/doc/test.Rmd", warn = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8")

# Appliquer la fonction de remplacement
output <- replace_math(input)

# Écrire le contenu modifié
cat(output, sep = "\n")
```
